editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 28, 2026: Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump pushes for Iran deal; False Ebola claims run wild as Congo outbreak worsens
editionData.description: Global headlines: Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump pushes for Iran deal (Israel is “deepening its operation” in Lebanon, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said); False Ebola claims run wild as Congo outbreak worsens (Distrust and violence flare in the Democratic Republic of Congo as false claims spread that the outbreak — and the disease itself — is a hoax); and To repair ties with India, Rubio leans into pageantry (The top U.S. diplomat visited the world’s largest democracy in a bid to reverse soured relations over Trump’s tariff agenda and embrace of Pakistan). Markets leaned lower, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes down; HANG SENG INDEX down 1.88% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Can we have the day off? (So, apparently we are at the cusp of the entire world’s white collar workforce (and, by extension, much of the US workforce)...); YouTube to automatically label AI-generated videos (We've heard consistently from our community that they value transparency when it comes to generative AI content. Two new updates will make...); and I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit (Anthropic are strongly rumored to be about to have their first profitable quarter. Stories are circulating of companies surprised at how...). Product Hunt features Archi-Flow (Visualize cloud architecture with live traffic simulations), Phasr (Run 100+ workflows simultaneously without losing context), and Netfox (A native local macOS network monitor).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Lebanon ceasefire falters as Trump pushes for Iran deal
headlines.summary: Israel is “deepening its operation” in Lebanon, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said.

headlines.title: False Ebola claims run wild as Congo outbreak worsens
headlines.summary: Distrust and violence flare in the Democratic Republic of Congo as false claims spread that the outbreak — and the disease itself — is a hoax.

headlines.title: To repair ties with India, Rubio leans into pageantry
headlines.summary: The top U.S. diplomat visited the world’s largest democracy in a bid to reverse soured relations over Trump’s tariff agenda and embrace of Pakistan.

headlines.title: Iran threatens retaliation after U.S. strikes in southern Iran
headlines.summary: The attacks prompted Tehran to warn that it would “leave no act of hostility unanswered,” complicating negotiations to end the war.

headlines.title: U.S. allies in Asia are trying to shield themselves from Trump’s unpredictability
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump’s seeming ambivalence about the value of allies has created a sense of urgency among nations with close U.S. ties.

headlines.title: Google employee charged with insider trading over Polymarket bets
headlines.summary: Michele Spagnuolo allegedly used insider information to profit from bets on people on Google's most-searched list.

headlines.title: Aid cuts and climate change drive deadly malaria surge in Zimbabwe
headlines.summary: A surge in malaria cases in Zimbabwe is exposing fragile health systems and growing treatment shortages in rural areas.

headlines.title: US returns Palestinian rights expert Francesca Albanese to sanctions list
headlines.summary: Trump administration has sought to pressure international officials who scrutinise reported abuses by Israeli forces.

headlines.title: US strikes Iranian site; Israel orders all residents to flee south Lebanon
headlines.summary: Kuwait's military says air defences are battling 'hostile' missiles and drones, as alarms sound across the country.

headlines.title: Jill Biden worried husband Joe was ‘having a stroke’ during 2024 US debate
headlines.summary: The former US first lady said she had never seen former President Joe Biden act the way he did on the 2024 debate stage.

headlines.title: DOJ charges Google staffer over Polymarket trades netting $1.2 million
headlines.summary: It's the second known case of the federal government filing criminal charges against someone who allegedly used insider information to make a large profit on a prediction market site.

headlines.title: NPR's newsroom shrinks through buyouts and layoffs
headlines.summary: At least 18 NPR journalists have accepted buyouts and another 10 have been laid off as the public media network attempts to save money and reorganize the newsroom.

headlines.title: More people are going hungry now than at the height of the pandemic
headlines.summary: Food insecurity affects more families now than during the coronavirus pandemic, according to a new survey from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

headlines.title: Former Obama adviser reflects on the 'Battle for American Identity'
headlines.summary: Ben Rhodes was a speechwriter and security adviser for President Obama. His book, All We Say, is a collection of 15 speeches — from Ben Franklin to Trump — about what it means to be American.

headlines.title: Greetings from Cape Verde, where the sounds of samba, jazz and morna fill the air
headlines.summary: Music is interwoven with the sounds of daily life in this West African island nation, which hosted two international music festivals in April and has been named the African Capital of Culture for 2028.

headlines.title: Vucic sees new chapter in bilateral ties
headlines.summary: When robots performed Serbia's Moravac folk dance on Wednesday at an innovation center in Jiaxing, Zhejiang province, Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic saw more than a display of smart technology.

headlines.title: Why Europe is world's fastest warming continent
headlines.summary: PARIS — Europe, which is in the throes of a record-smashing heat wave this week, is the world's fastest-warming continent and stretches into an even more rapidly heating Arctic.

headlines.title: Israel says it killed new head of Hamas' armed wing
headlines.summary: JERUSALEM/CAIRO — Israel said on Wednesday it had killed Hamas' newly appointed armed wing chief in Gaza, days after it killed his predecessor, while intensifying military pressure in Gaza and expanding operations in Lebanon.

headlines.title: Chinese FM highlights China's contributions to UN cause
headlines.summary: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on Tuesday briefed on his country's contributions to the UN cause at a high-level meeting of the Security Council.

headlines.title: China, UK seek to deepen economic cooperation
headlines.summary: China and the United Kingdom have voiced a strong desire and support for deeper economic engagement to unlock new growth opportunities in bilateral cooperation, as the two countries move to develop a long-term and consistent comprehensive strategic partnership.

headlines.title: PM Modi stresses whole-of-nation approach to tackle heatwave: Vaishnaw
headlines.summary: PM Modi emphasizes a "whole-of-nation" strategy to combat heatwave effects, urging ministries to protect citizens amid soaring temperatures.

headlines.title: Supreme Court upholds SIR exercise as an advancement towards free and fair elections
headlines.summary: Supreme Court upholds Special Intensive Revision, reinforcing the Election Commission's role in ensuring free and fair elections through citizenship verification.

headlines.title: Government kick-starts mega AMCA stealth fighter jet programme
headlines.summary: India launches the AMCA stealth fighter jet program, inviting bids from major private defence firms for next-gen aircraft development.

headlines.title: Centre fears ‘divergence of views’ among High Courts on new transgender law; asks SC to transfer cases to itself
headlines.summary: Centre seeks Supreme Court intervention to unify divergent High Court views on the controversial Transgender Persons Amendment Act, 2026.

headlines.title: Supreme Court seeks Centre, NCERT's responses on plea against CBSE's three-language rule for Class 9 students
headlines.summary: Supreme Court to review plea against CBSE's mandatory three-language policy for Class 9 students, seeking responses from Centre and NCERT.

headlines.title: Exclusive: US carries out new strikes in Iran against a military site and drones, official says
headlines.summary: Reuters: Exclusive: US carries out new strikes in Iran against a military site and drones, official says.

headlines.title: How Venezuela awarded Centerview a prized debt role with little competition
headlines.summary: Reuters: How Venezuela awarded Centerview a prized debt role with little competition.

headlines.title: Trump says he can outwait Iran, dismisses midterm election pressure
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump says he can outwait Iran, dismisses midterm election pressure.

headlines.title: HP tops revenue, profit estimates as AI PC and Windows 11 refresh boost demand
headlines.summary: Reuters: HP tops revenue, profit estimates as AI PC and Windows 11 refresh boost demand.

headlines.title: Viral fame spares ‘Donald Trump’ buffalo from Eid sacrifice in Bangladesh
headlines.summary: Reuters: Viral fame spares ‘Donald Trump’ buffalo from Eid sacrifice in Bangladesh.

hackerNews.title: Can we have the day off?
hackerNews.summary: So, apparently we are at the cusp of the entire world’s white collar workforce (and, by extension, much of the US workforce) undergoing a revolution in productivity. AI is the technology that is going to revolutionize the way we work, the way we interact with the world, the way we learn, the way we socialize, and all of this. This sounds great. Really, it does. Everything getting faster and easier would be an extraordinary boon to all of our lives.

hackerNews.title: YouTube to automatically label AI-generated videos
hackerNews.summary: We've heard consistently from our community that they value transparency when it comes to generative AI content. Two new updates will make this process much simpler and more intuitive for creators and viewers on YouTube.

hackerNews.title: What Apple and Google are doing to push notifications
hackerNews.summary: I wrote recently about what Google, Yahoo, Microsoft, and Apple are doing to your email: how four providers stopped being transport layers and turned into active intermediaries between brands and their customers, parsing, ranking, summarising, and increasingly answering on the recipient's behalf.

hackerNews.title: FBI Arrests CIA Official with $40M in Gold Bars in His Home
hackerNews.summary: nytimes.com: FBI Arrests CIA Official with $40M in Gold Bars in His Home.

hackerNews.title: I'm Getting into Mesh Networks (Meshtastic, MeshCore, and Reticulum)
hackerNews.summary: I love networking, a lot. So much so that I've run my own ISP since 2024, complete with its own ASN, IPv4/6 address space, fiber optics, etc. However, do this and you quickly realize how reliant you still remain on central service providers. The internet is a mesh, but

hackerNews.title: Rust (and Slint) on a Jailbroken Kindle
hackerNews.summary: I recently jailbroke my 7th generation Kindle Paperwhite. While my motivation probably should have been "breaking free from Amazon's clammy and tightening grip", the truth is I wanted a way to use it as a clock on my nightstand. I found this project and figured I could just make some adjustments to the code. And that worked fine . But as I now had opened the door, I started thinking about if I could get Rust to work on the Kindle as well. Maybe I could do more useful stuff with it? As I have recently started to tinker with Home Assistant and smart devices again, the idea of a dashboard for some of the features could be a fun project. And while there are probably many perfectly fine projects out there, I haven't made any of those.
